recommendation_rationale_governance_expl.text: This read model summarizes an approved governance record. It does not authorize action.

evidence_summary_refs_available_v0.text: Evidence references are available through the cited source refs.

uncertainty_summary_refs_available_v0.text: Uncertainty remains represented by the cited uncertainty refs.

constraints_summary_review_only_v0.text: Constraints are summarized for review. They are not executable parameters.

approval_governance_status_only_v0.text: Human approval was recorded for governance status only.

human_review_before_downstream_translati.text: Further human review is required before downstream action translation or approval.

downstream_action_translation_required_v.text: Downstream action translation is required before any action candidate can be proposed.

downstream_action_approval_required_v0.text: Downstream action approval is required before any execution task can exist.
